---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, orchestrator, backend, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing the feature. -->

## Problem or Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature in detail. If it's a new tool, describe the tool name,
     inputs, outputs, and which domain it belongs to (targets/orchestrators/scorers/etc). -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you choose this one? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any relevant links, references, or examples. -->

## Contribution
- [ ] I am willing to implement this feature and submit a PR
